mapper.sql:
WHERE 1 = 1
AND notifications.source IN
#{sourceItem}
AND LOWER(notifications.source) = LOWER(#{source})
AND LOWER(notifications.severity) = LOWER(#{severity})
AND ( COALESCE(notifications.title, '') ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(notifications.message, '') ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(notifications.module, '') ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(notifications.action, '') ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(notifications.username, '') ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(notifications.hospital_name, '') ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(notifications.patient_name, '') ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(notifications.patient_uid, '') ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(notifications.visit_code, '') ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(notifications.accession_number, '') ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(notifications.modality_name, '') ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(notifications.endpoint, '') ILIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%' )
mapper.select:
SELECT notifications.id, notifications.reference_id, notifications.source, notifications.type, notifications.severity, notifications.title, notifications.message, notifications.module, notifications.action, notifications.username, notifications.user_name, notifications.hospital_id, notifications.hospital_public_key, notifications.hospital_name, notifications.patient_id, notifications.patient_public_key, notifications.patient_name, notifications.patient_uid, notifications.worklist_id, notifications.worklist_public_key, notifications.study_id, notifications.study_public_key, notifications.visit_code, notifications.accession_number, notifications.modality_name, notifications.created_at, notifications.endpoint, notifications.unread FROM
ORDER BY notifications.created_at_sort DESC, notifications.reference_id DESC LIMIT #{rowsPerPage}
